name: Enkorok Safari Camp NON RESIDENTS 2025 Agent Contract Rates

origin.filename: Enkorok Safari Camp NON RESIDENTS 2025 Agent Contract Rates.pdf

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Family tent allocation will apply to a maximum of 5 paying Pax ( 4 adults, or 2 adults and 3 children ).
texts.text:  Family tent allocation will apply to a maximum of 5 paying Pax ( 4 adults, or 2 adults and 3 children ).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Family tent supplement US$ 50 per family per night.
texts.text:  Family tent supplement US$ 50 per family per night.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A Child under 3 years sharing a room with 1-2 adults is accommodated on a complimentary basis.
texts.text: A Child under 3 years sharing a room with 1-2 adults is accommodated on a complimentary basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A Child from 3-12 years sharing a room with 2 adults is charged 50% of the per person adult rate.
texts.text: A Child from 3-12 years sharing a room with 2 adults is charged 50% of the per person adult rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If own room is required 75% of adult rate is chargeable.
texts.text: If own room is required 75% of adult rate is chargeable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Young Adults 12 to 17 years are charged 75% of the per person adult Twin rate .
texts.text: Young Adults 12 to 17 years are charged 75% of the per person adult Twin rate .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full board accommodation only. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner & 4pm tea)
texts.text: Full board accommodation only. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner & 4pm tea)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All drinks are extra & payable directly.
texts.text: All drinks are extra & payable directly.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We confirm up to a maximum of three (3) singles per group at single room rate. Any additional single rooms request will be charged at double room rate.
texts.text: We confirm up to a maximum of three (3) singles per group at single room rate. Any additional single rooms request will be charged at double room rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Jan - June: US$.100 per day per adult, US$.50 per child per day 9-17yrs)
texts.text: Jan - June: US$.100 per day per adult, US$.50 per child per day 9-17yrs)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Jul - Dec: US$.200 per day per adult, US$.50 per child per
texts.text: Jul - Dec: US$.200 per day per adult, US$.50 per child per

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Transfers for Cultural visits (excluding entry fees).
texts.text: Transfers for Cultural visits (excluding entry fees).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All drinks are extras payable directly at the Enkorok Mara Camp.
texts.text: All drinks are extras payable directly at the Enkorok Mara Camp.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Exclusive use of vehicle -US $280 per day for game drives only.
texts.text: Exclusive use of vehicle -US $280 per day for game drives only.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Gratuities & anything of a personal nature.
texts.text: Gratuities & anything of a personal nature.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child in own tent is at 75%
texts.text: Child in own tent is at 75%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Extra Hot Lunch: US$ 25.00 per person.
texts.text: Extra Hot Lunch: US$ 25.00 per person.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Guests Check-in: 1200hrs (on the booked arrival date).
texts.text:  Guests Check-in: 1200hrs (on the booked arrival date).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Guests Check-out: 1000hrs (late check outs is subject to accommodations availability).
texts.text:  Guests Check-out: 1000hrs (late check outs is subject to accommodations availability).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  To reserve and confirm your slot on any trip, a deposit of 30% of the total amount of the invoice is required to be paid.
texts.text:  To reserve and confirm your slot on any trip, a deposit of 30% of the total amount of the invoice is required to be paid.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  An advance payment of 30% as a deposit should be paid within 10 days from the date of the Enkorok Safari Camp Proforma invoice and the balance 10 days prior to guests check-in.
texts.text:  An advance payment of 30% as a deposit should be paid within 10 days from the date of the Enkorok Safari Camp Proforma invoice and the balance 10 days prior to guests check-in.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Enkorok Safari Camp recommends early reservations in order to guarantee accommodations to our valued clients.
texts.text:  Enkorok Safari Camp recommends early reservations in order to guarantee accommodations to our valued clients.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The general cancellation policy for Enkorok Safari Camp is as follows:
texts.text: The general cancellation policy for Enkorok Safari Camp is as follows:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All terms and conditions of this Contract are confidential between Enkorok Safari Camp Ltd and the Agent and no information regarding the content of this contract may be divulged to third parties without a written authorization from Enkorok Safari Camp Ltd.
texts.text: All terms and conditions of this Contract are confidential between Enkorok Safari Camp Ltd and the Agent and no information regarding the content of this contract may be divulged to third parties without a written authorization from Enkorok Safari Camp Ltd.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Contract is valid until 2 nd  January 2026.
texts.text: This Contract is valid until 2 nd  January 2026.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of unavoidable circumstances that warrant any changes in respect to terms and conditions of this agreement such changes shall be notified in writing to the aggrieved party.
texts.text: In the event of unavoidable circumstances that warrant any changes in respect to terms and conditions of this agreement such changes shall be notified in writing to the aggrieved party.
